---
name: "[PERF] Performance Improvement"
about: Report or suggest a performance improvement — title must start with [PERF]
title: "[PERF] "
labels: performance
assignees: ""
---

## Current Behavior

What is slow or resource-heavy?

## Expected Improvement

What should improve? (latency, CPU, memory, etc.)

## Measurement

How to measure the improvement? Include benchmarks if available.

## Proposed Approach

How to achieve the improvement?

## Context

- Which mode? (statusline, watch, dock, status, scanner)
- How many AI sessions running?
